# TFG Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-09

## Active Technologies
- Node.js 18+ on backend, React 19 with TypeScript 5.9 on frontend + Express.js v4, Prisma 6, React 19, Vite, Axios, Joi, `socket.io`, `socket.io-client` (002-realtime-reservations)
- PostgreSQL via Prisma Client (002-realtime-reservations)

- Node.js + Express (ES6+), React + TypeScript + Prisma Client, Joi, Winston, Axios (001-crm-module-management)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

Node.js + Express (ES6+), React + TypeScript: Follow standard conventions
